python.code:
# Python (SQLAlchemy ORM)
user = User(name='Raj')
session.add(user)
session.commit()

user = session.query(User).filter_by(name='Raj').first()
user.email = 'raj@example.com'
session.commit()

session.delete(user)
session.commit()

comparisons.explanation: CRUD is universal: every language and database implements these 4 operations. The syntax differs but the concept is identical.

keyInsight: CRUD is the FOUNDATION of all backend development. Whether you use SQL or NoSQL, JavaScript or Python, the 4 operations are always the same.
